name: Technocount-Automatic-Counters-V1.docx
content:
What are the King Technocount automatic tablet counting machines?

The King Technocount range includes the T8, T12, T16, and T24 — fully automatic multi-channel tablet and capsule counting machines designed for high-speed pharmaceutical and nutraceutical production lines.

Details

  • T8: 8-channel counter for medium production volumes
  • T12: 12-channel counter for higher throughput
  • T16: 16-channel counter for large-scale operations
  • T24: 24-channel counter for maximum output
  • All models count tablets, capsules, caplets, and softgels with high accuracy
  • Touchscreen HMI interface for recipe management and batch control
  • Designed for integration into complete packaging lines
  • CE marked, built to pharmaceutical-grade standards
  • Extraction connection tubes and other spare parts available (e.g., 1MP89105)
  • The T8 is the most commonly requested automatic counter

Link: https://www.ceking.com/collections/automatic-tablet-capsule-counting-machines
